verdict: A rhythmically accurate chart that tracks the song's energy well, but is severely held back by a complete right-side jump bias and some awkward stream transitions.

issues.problem: Extreme right-side bias in jump selection. Out of 31 total jumps, every single one involves the Right panel (UR, DR, LR). The complete absence of UL or DL jumps makes the physical movement feel incredibly lopsided and repetitive.
Awkward stream flow. Rapid sequences like U -> D -> R and U -> D -> L force either uncomfortable crossovers or double-steps that disrupt the physical flow for a chart of this density.
